headline: Progressive Reports June 2026 Results
summary: MAYFIELD VILLAGE, OHIO, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) today reported the following results for the month and quarter ended June 30, 2026: JuneQuarter(millions, except per share amounts and ratios; unaudited) 2026 2025 Change 2026 2025 ChangeNet premiums written$6,772 $6,605 3 %$21,077 $20,076 5 %Net premiums earned$7,100 $6,954 2 %$21,573 $20,310 6 %Net income$779 $1,124 (31)%$3,311 $3,175 4 %Per share available to common shareholders$1.34 $1.91 (30)%$5
